description: A designed dark-navy graphic titled 'ENFORCEMENT UPDATE', topped by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement seal and name. It presents two large white figures: '913 Arrests' and '763 Detainers Lodged', with a footnote 'between 12 a.m. and 11:59 p.m. Jan. 30'. There is no photograph; it is a text-and-seal data card.
notable_text: ENFORCEMENT UPDATE; 913 Arrests; 763 Detainers Lodged; between 12 a.m. and 11:59 p.m. Jan. 30
